# clang trunk: crash in IRBuilder::CreateCast / ScalarExprEmitter::VisitCastExpr for vector long double comparison return

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/170073
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/E5xeMqdjv

- clang crashed on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

```console

PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
typedef long double a __attribute__((vector_size(16)));

a sum(a first, a second) { return first >= second; }
```

## Code
```c
typedef long double a __attribute__((vector_size(16)));

a sum(a first, a second) { return first &gt;= second; }
```
